calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition For Change Of Gender And Issuance Of A New Birth Certificate.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Calvin Michael West was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication not required.

No objections were made at the hearing, and it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
